message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker with completed parity tasks

Closed issues:
- bd-23l: Close TUI graph/insights interaction parity
- bd-28c: Close TUI board detail shortcut parity gaps
- bd-2i1: Close TUI history mode visual/interaction parity
- bd-38a: Tighten conformance fixture corpus for edge cases
- bd-lrk: Finish history/correlation export-toolchain parity
- bd-rcx: Suggest/history edge-case tuning against legacy fixtures

Status changes:
- bd-3q0 (TUI keyboard/visual parity): in_progress -> closed
  (completed parity implementation and validation)

Dependency timestamp normalization:
- Several dependency created_at fields normalized to import timestamps
  (bd-21q, bd-2s3, bd-3tj dependencies)

Added .br_history/ snapshots for issue state tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
